inputs.label: Initial Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of material at the start of the drying process

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of material at the start of the drying process
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht des Materials zu Beginn des Trocknungsprozesses
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids du matériau au début du processus de séchage
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso del material al inicio del proceso de secado
businessContext_i18n.ar: وزن المادة في بداية عملية التجفيف

inputs.label: Dry Weight
inputs.businessContext: Asymptotic bone-dry weight of the material (lowest attainable weight)

businessContext_i18n.en: Asymptotic bone-dry weight of the material (lowest attainable weight)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin asimptotik kemik kuru ağırlığı (ulaşılabilir en düşük ağırlık)
businessContext_i18n.de: Asymptotisches knochentrockenes Gewicht des Materials (niedrigstes erreichbares Gewicht)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids asymptotique sec à l'os du matériau (poids le plus bas atteignable)
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso asintótico completamente seco del material (peso más bajo alcanzable)
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوزن الجاف التقاربي للمادة (أدنى وزن يمكن بلوغه)

inputs.label: Target Weight
inputs.businessContext: Desired final weight after drying (must be > dryWeight)

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired final weight after drying (must be > dryWeight)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kurutma sonrası istenen nihai ağırlık (dryWeight'ten büyük olmalıdır)
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschtes Endgewicht nach Trocknung (muss > Trockengewicht sein)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids final souhaité après séchage (doit être > poids sec)
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso final deseado después del secado (debe ser > peso seco)
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوزن النهائي المطلوب بعد التجفيف (يجب أن يكون أكبر من الوزن الجاف)

inputs.label: Drying Rate Constant
inputs.businessContext: Exponential drying constant (k) characterizing the speed of moisture removal

businessContext_i18n.en: Exponential drying constant (k) characterizing the speed of moisture removal
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nem giderme hızını karakterize eden üstel kurutma sabiti (k)
businessContext_i18n.de: Exponentielle Trocknungskonstante (k), die die Geschwindigkeit der Feuchtigkeitsentfernung charakterisiert
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante de séchage exponentielle (k) caractérisant la vitesse d'élimination de l'humidité
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante de secado exponencial (k) que caracteriza la velocidad de eliminación de humedad
businessContext_i18n.ar: ثابت التجفيف الأسي (k) الذي يميز سرعة إزالة الرطوبة

inputs.label: Process Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency factor (0–100) scaling the effective drying rate

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency factor (0–100) scaling the effective drying rate
businessContext_i18n.tr: Verimlilik faktörü (0–100), efektif kurutma hızını ölçekler
businessContext_i18n.de: Wirkungsgradfaktor (0–100), der die effektive Trocknungsrate skaliert
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'efficacité (0–100) ajustant le taux de séchage effectif
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de eficiencia (0–100) que escala la velocidad de secado efectiva
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل الكفاءة (0–100) لقياس معدل التجفيف الفعال

inputs.label: Setup Time
inputs.businessContext: Initial handling or delay time before active drying begins

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial handling or delay time before active drying begins
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aktif kurutma başlamadan önceki ilk işlem veya gecikme süresi
businessContext_i18n.de: Anfängliche Handhabungs- oder Verzögerungszeit vor Beginn der aktiven Trocknung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de manutention ou de délai initial avant le début du séchage actif
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo de manipulación o retardo inicial antes de que comience el secado activo
businessContext_i18n.ar: وقت المناولة أو التأخير الأولي قبل بدء التجفيف النشط

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Target weight must be greater than dry weight.
Initial weight must be greater than target weight.
Drying rate constant must be positive.
Process efficiency must be between 0 and 100.
